title: Unna Nenachche Lyrics Apoorva Sagodharargal
stanzas:
Unna nenachche paattu padichchen
thangame nyaana thangame
enna nenachche naanum sirichen
thangame nyaana thangame (2)

andha vaanam azhuthaa thaan
indha boomiye sirikkum
vaanam pol silapaer
sondha vazhkaiyum irukkum.
unarndhen naan...

Unna nenachche paattu padichchen
thangame nyaana thangame
enna nenachche naanum sirichen
thangame nyaana thangame (2)

aasai vandhu ennai
aatti vaiththa paavam.
mattravarai naan yaen
kuttram solla venum.

kottum mazhai kaalam
uppu virka ponen.
kattradikkum neram
maavu virka ponen.

Unna nenachche paattu padichchen
thangame nyaana thangame
enna nenachche naanum sirichen
thangame nyaana thangame (2)

kannil rendil naanthaan
kadhal enum kottai
katti vaiththu paarthen
aththanaiyum oattai

Unna nenachche paattu padichchen
thangame nyaana thangame
enna nenachche naanum sirichen
thangame nyaana thangame

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unna Nenachche'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and affection, highlighting the joy and nostalgia associated with romantic memories.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Apoorva Sagodharargal'?

In the movie, the song plays during a pivotal moment that emphasizes the protagonist's feelings for their beloved, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Unna Nenachche'?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Unna Nenachche' released?

The song was released on April 14, 1989.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unna Nenachche, the lyrics convey a heartfelt expression of love, encapsulating the emotions of longing and joy. The song serves as a backdrop to significant moments in Apoorva Sagodharargal, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film. With its soothing melody and poignant lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unna Nenachche is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of romance. Dive into the world of Apoorva Sagodharargal and let the magic of this classic take you on a heartfelt journey.
stanzaMeanings: I have sung the song thinking of you, and I smile thinking of you too.
That sky is beautiful, just like this earth that smiles. I feel it...
I have sung the song thinking of you, and I smile thinking of you too.
Desire has caught me, poor me. I need to tell others my fault.
During the rainy season, I feel salty. When the wind blows, I feel like dough.
I made a mistake by calculating wrongly.
After the song, I understood clearly.
You have understood my well-being, and I thank you for that.
I have sung the song thinking of you, and I smile thinking of you too.
In my eyes, I see love as a strong bond, and I observe everything.
Inside, there is a connection that lasts forever. It will grow well like a good tree.
Until the dance ends, we will keep dancing.
When the dance ends, we will take a break.
You have understood my well-being, and I thank you for that.
I have sung the song thinking of you, and I smile thinking of you too.
